summary: Script has solid Bash hygiene (set -euo pipefail, quoted variables, die() error handling, mockable LICENSE_DB). CRITICAL: Workflow uses `actions/checkout@v4` unpinned to commit SHA—violates explicit best-practice requirement. Awk manifest parsing lacks validation; silent failures if malformed input. Fixture paths hardcoded in workflow env vars. Would require action SHA-pinning + parsing error checks before shipping.
